{{Infobox character
| name = Shyrax the Third
| species = Alien
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Queen of the planet Karosha, [[Queen]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|, exiled Karoshan queen}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karoshan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Queen]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karosha]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax the Third is the legitimate [[Queen]] of the planet [[Karosha]]. Having ascended to the throne nine years ago following her mother's abdication, she is forty-one years old. Her reign was interrupted when the [[Dragon Court]] convicted her of treason for unknown reasons, leading to her cousin, [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]], temporarily taking control. A nine-foot-tall [[Karoshan]] with golden hair and a forehead circlet, she is a highly versatile combatant and specialist. She is proficient with force-blades, pistols, and magic wands, and she has demonstrated mastery in piloting, military command, and technical repairs. Seeking to reclaim her throne, she joined the crew of [[The Last Horizon]] as their [[Commander]], though she maintains a firm requirement for leadership and refuses to act against her own people. While operating as a rebel, she utilizes [[Karoshan forces]] to bolster her strength and aims to eventually negotiate an end to the ongoing war once she is restored to power.}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Shyrax the Third]] is the rightful [[Queen]] of the planet [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Shyrax the Third]] is a nine-foot-tall [[Karoshan]] and the rightful [[Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] is a nine-foot-tall [[Karoshan]] woman with leathery yellow skin and bronze eyes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] is the exiled [[Karoshan queen]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] wears a diadem.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] has yellow arms and wears elaborate armor shimmering with enchantments.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Karoshan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
